obs: Watched 'Hamilton' on Disney+ ~3 weeks ago, loved it; seeking similar musicals with contemporary music style.
Watched 'Newsies' and 'Aladdin' on Disney+; loved stage design and costumes in Newsies specifically.
Interested in 'In the Heights' (Lin-Manuel Miranda) and 'Freestyle Love Supreme' (improvised hip-hop musical).
'Freestyle Love Supreme' available on Hulu (US); also available on Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV, Google Play, Vudu, YouTube Movies.
Interested in musical theater history; actively listening to podcast episodes about theater history and behind-the-scenes stories.
Recently started participating in 'Book Lovers' group discussions (started today).
Interested in fiction across genres; particularly drawn to fantasy and science fiction with diverse representation and strong female protagonists.
Follows book review websites: Goodreads, Book Riot, NYT Book Review, Kirkus, Publishers Weekly, The Millions, BookPage, Library Journal, NPR Books, The Guardian Books.
Morning routine: wake 6:30 AM, 1 hour to get ready (20-min meditation, 30-min workout, quick breakfast).
Already tried oatmeal for breakfast, working well; interested in trying avocado toast with poached eggs and cherry tomatoes.
Using Headspace for meditation; interested in 'Morning Energy' (10-min session) for energy and focus boost.
Recently added strength training: upper body Tuesdays and Thursdays, lower body Wednesdays and Fridays.
Seeking high-protein lunch ideas (40+ grams); interested in unconventional fruits for protein: guava (4g/cup), durian (3.6g/cup).
Planning to add guava to morning oatmeal at 1:2 ratio (1 part guava to 2 parts oatmeal); interested in hemp seeds (1-2 tbsp/serving).
Planning trip to visit family in home country next 2-3 months for 2 weeks; flying from Brooklyn (JFK/LGA).
Got visa approval 3 months ago; now settled in Brooklyn; recently completed move/setup after visa approval.
Interested in American Airlines Business Club World to London; considering gift baskets from Sahadi's and Brooklyn Kitchen for family.
Taken 7 flights in past 3 months; accumulated significant airline miles; considering business class upgrade for Tokyo-Osaka domestic flight.
Planning Tokyo trip in May; wants to stay in Roppongi; considering overnight stay in Hot Springs before Max Patch hike.
Selling Toyota Camry; tracking maintenance to show buyers. Jan 10, 2023: $250 Toyota dealership service (23,456 mi); Jan 18: $35.50 gas; Feb 12: $80 tire balance/align.
Purchased handmade candle and artisanal soaps from holiday market December 15; planning gift wrapping with kraft paper, twine, lavender sachets.
Feeling disconnected from social circle; spending more time alone than comfortable with. Trigger: 2 weeks ago tough work day, ate takeout alone (3rd time that week).
Wants to reconnect: considering reaching out to old friends, looking into book clubs, hiking groups; hesitant to commit to regular groups yet.
Stayed at Hyatt Regency Chicago ~3 weeks ago for work conference; conveniently located near venue.
During Chicago work trip, managed to visit Willis Tower; stepped onto the Ledge (4.3-foot extension, 103rd floor); found views incredible.
Colleague recommended Lou Malnati's deep-dish pizza; tried it, very impressed with thick crust and flavorful fillings.
Interested in Ukiyo-e woodblock prints after learning about artistic techniques; identified famous works: Great Wave off Kanagawa, Red Fuji, 53 Stations Tokaido.
Located online Ukiyo-e resources: Smithsonian Freer/Sackler, Met Online, British Museum (2,000+), National Diet Library (20,000+), Ukiyo-e.org (225,000+).
Tried ukulele at community center music workshop; also tried harmonica and drums; ukulele resonated most, loved portability and ease.
Budget for ukulele: $100-150; interested in mahogany (warm tone, durable); prefers concert or tenor size; has prior guitar lessons.
Recent Walmart run (last Saturday): $75. Bought chicken breasts, frozen vegetables, cereal (BOGO), 24-pack Diet Coke.
Purchases snacks like Diet Coke every other week; trying to eat relatively healthy; reducing food waste by meal planning and using leftovers.
Took break from social media; by day 10 felt disconnected from current events; checking news websites directly felt more informative.
Planning daily routine: 30 minutes morning news, 30 minutes evening news; using apps (Apple News, Google News, Flipboard); planning weekly Sunday review/reflection.
Attended 'Impressionist Masters' exhibition at City Art Museum today; loved the Water Lily painting; fond of Impressionism.
Interested in Post-Impressionism and women artists; particularly Eva Gonzalès' 'Une Loge aux Théâtre des Italiens' (1874).
Taking sculpting classes for 3 months, experimenting with polymer and air-dry clay; planning to showcase sculptures at local art fair next month.
Creating small, intricate mixed-media piece combining clay with found objects (seashells, pebbles); watched Lisa's YouTube tutorials on miniature sculptures.
Planning mountain hiking trip next month; road trip 2 weeks ago to visit family (4-hour drive each way).
Wants moderate difficulty hike (3-4 hours) with scenic vistas; planning overnight in Hot Springs; familiar with Asheville, ~4.5-hour drive from home.
Brother started high school last month, struggling to adjust to new schedule/workload; user helping with math homework.
Mom having frequent migraines from stress; user recommending relaxation techniques, lifestyle changes, stress management strategies.
Has golden retriever puppy named Max; started leaving alone at home for short periods today.
Planning interactive toys/puzzle feeders for Max; considering rotating toys every 2-3 days; looking at Kong Classic, Tricky Treat Ball, Outward Hound Brick.
Met Alex Chen, CEO of StartUpX, discussing partnership opportunities; follow-up conversation planned for next week.
Looking for face moisturizers; considering Cetaphil Moisturizing Cream ($15, Amazon); interested in price matching at Ulta/Walgreens.
Listened to Saddleback Church sermon about impact and grace; summarized 5 major points; designed 5-day practice exercise program for sermon principles.
Wants to visit Moffat, Scotland during Christmas Festival (lantern parade, fireworks, markets); interested in Scottish traditions (Hogmanay, First Footing).
Moffat accommodation options: Buccleuch Arms Hotel, The Stag Hotel, The Bonnington B&B, Best Western Moffat House, Craigieburn Guest House.
Flight to LA on American Airlines February 10; middle seat very uncomfortable; in-flight meal was bland chicken sandwich.
Watched 'Joker' and 'Parasite' back-to-back on Feb 10 flight; had been wanting to watch both films; very satisfied with selections.
